steps: Log in or create a GoCardless account
Click 'Create token' in the top-right corner
Enter a name for the token and select the scope (read-only or read-write)
Copy the token immediately — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your GoCardless access token, sent as 'Bearer <token>' in the Authorization header

notes: GoCardless has two separate environments: Sandbox (free, for testing) and Live (for real payments)
Sandbox tokens begin with 'sandbox_' and must be used against api-sandbox.gocardless.com
Live tokens begin with 'live_' and are used against api.gocardless.com
Access tokens are shown only once at creation — store them securely
A live account requires completing GoCardless's onboarding and KYC process

test_endpoint.description: List creditors to verify the access token is valid and the account is active
